The [Lookbook] is a catalog where everyone can register and share their
character's unique style with others.

You can check out the latest fashion, and also register your own outfits.
If you dig someone's style, you can even send them a [Like].

You can confirm the [Likes] you've sent from the [Communications Log]
in the Main Menu.

What are you waiting for? Fire up the [Lookbook] from the Main Menu
and get browsing!
